name: accept-task
description: Accept and execute an incoming worker task via HTTP POST /run

tasks.detail:
- [ ] Read the task description carefully
- [ ] Note any sync flag (synchronous execution expected)
- [ ] Identify what Final Answer format is expected
Gate: Task fully understood before acting.

Use available tools to complete the task:
- [ ] Read files if needed (read_file, grep_file)
- [ ] Write/modify files if needed (write_file, replace_in_file)
- [ ] Run commands if needed (run_command)
- [ ] Search/capture if needed (find_files, cmux_capture)
- [ ] Track all files_modified and files_examined
Gate: Requested work completed or error captured.

tasks.content: [WORKER] Verify output and return Final Answer
tasks.detail:
- [ ] Confirm the output matches the task expectations
- [ ] Include Final Answer: <summary> in response
- [ ] Report any errors encountered
- [ ] List files modified (agent_server tracks automatically)
Gate: Result ready for coordinator to collect.
